reasoning: The reference price for April 27, 2025, will be the close on Friday, April 25, which is $63.69. This represents a recent "bear market rally" from local lows around $60.50. A.O. Analysts have recently lowered price targets (e.g., UBS lowering from $80 to $74), reinforcing near-term downward pressure. A CEO transition effective July 1 also adds midterm uncertainty. Due to the recent bounce setting a relatively high local threshold and the anticipated negative earnings catalyst, I assign a sub-50% probability (0.44) for the first date. Following standard forecasting methodology, my estimates revert smoothly to the base rate of 0.50 as the forecast horizon extends to six months out, reflecting increasing uncertainty.
